_comment: Domain vocabulary for transcription. 'initial_prompt' primes Whisper toward correct spellings (prevention). 'corrections' are applied to the finished transcript (cure). Keep corrections PHRASE-SCOPED: single common words like 'opioid' or 'England' must never be replaced bare, because they have legitimate uses.
initial_prompt: A technology podcast discussing AI research and industry news. Recurring names and terms: Peter Diamandis, Dave Blundin, Salim Ismail, Alex Wissner-Gross, Ramin Hasani, Liquid AI, Mira Murati, Thinking Machines Lab, Demis Hassabis, DeepMind, Sam Altman, Elon Musk, Alex Karp, Palantir, Andrej Karpathy, Daniela Rus, MIT CSAIL, Anthropic, OpenAI, Nvidia, Anduril, Palmer Luckey. Technical terms: open-weight models, mixture of experts, fine-tuning, reinforcement fine-tuning, RFT, recursive self-improvement, Chinchilla scaling laws, quantization, ternary quantization, transformer architecture, state space models, Mamba, liquid neural networks, C. elegans, small language models, SLM, AGI, ASI, longevity escape velocity.

_risky_not_applied._note: Observed mistranscriptions that are NOT auto-corrected because the wrong form is also a legitimate word or the right form is uncertain. Fix these by hand or extend initial_prompt.
_risky_not_applied.England / Ingline: Almost certainly 'Inkling' (the Thinking Machines model), but 'England' appeared legitimately in the same episode (football talk).
_risky_not_applied.Gwen: Likely 'Qwen' (Alibaba model), but Gwen is a real name.
_risky_not_applied.WICO / Weco: Startup name uncertain from audio alone; verify against the source before adding.
_risky_not_applied.Mythos / mythos: May be a model codename or the ordinary noun.
